metadata.description: Official SettleMesh plugins for Claude Code — deploy and monetize agent-built apps (login, database, usage billing, end-user payments) and call the SettleMesh capability catalog over MCP.

plugins.name: settlemesh
plugins.description: Deploy and monetize agent-built apps — login, managed database, usage-based billing, and end-user payments in one command. Bundles the SettleMesh MCP server (search + invoke the full capability catalog).
